channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-18
item.description:
Our community has been bustling with activity across multiple projects. Notably, the **scienceverse/metacheck** project has seen significant progress with the merging of several pull requests on the 'dev' branch, incorporating changes from related projects such as **scienceverse/jw_plumber_bibr_api**, **scienceverse/jw_bibr_read_passthrough**, **scienceverse/jw_grobid_text_fix**, and **scienceverse/jw_schema_sync_10_5**. Meanwhile, the **marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing** project has been focused on refining its website and documentation, with updates to wording, testimonials, and recommendations on the `master` branch, as well as site builds for version `tenzing@0.4.1` on the `gh-pages` branch. These connections between projects demonstrate the collaborative spirit of our community, and we celebrate the progress being made towards advancing open-source research tools. With these updates, our community is one step closer to achieving its goals, and we look forward to seeing the continued growth and development of these projects.

42 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

regcheck18 commits
oddpub9 commits
metacheck8 commits
tenzing7 commits

item.title: metacheck: 5 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

Work was done on the 'data_check' branch, where "add japs jamovi" was implemented, as stated in the commit message. The 'dev' branch saw the merging of several pull requests, including #333 from 'scienceverse/jw_plumber_bibr_api'. Additionally on the 'dev' branch, pull requests #332 from 'scienceverse/jw_bibr_read_passthrough', #331 from 'scienceverse/jw_grobid_text_fix', and #330 from 'scienceverse/jw_schema_sync_10_5' were also merged. These merges on the 'dev' branch incorporated changes related to the JW plumber BIBR API, BIBR read passthrough, GROBID text fix, and schema sync 10.5, respectively.

5 commit(s) today:

  • 0612101 [data_check] add japs jamovi — Lakens

View all commits →

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` repository. The merge commit was made to integrate changes from the remote repository into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. Additionally, on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, "admin updates" were made, as per the commit message. No other branches were modified in this set of commits. The work was done by MicheleNuijten.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: tenzing: 7 commits today
item.description:
marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing

Work was done on the `gh-pages` branch, where Anka built the site for `tenzing@0.4.1` multiple times, as indicated by the commits "Built site for tenzing@0.4.1" with different hashes. On the `master` branch, Alex O. Holcombe made changes to the wording, specifically committing "improving wording" and "reword", suggesting multiple iterations of rephrasing. The `master` branch also saw the addition of italicized testimonials for emphasis, as stated in the commit "Italicize testimonials for emphasis". Furthermore, Alex O. Holcombe updated the `about.Rmd` file with recommendations and improved writing. The `master` branch saw these textual changes, while the `gh-pages` branch was focused on building the site for the `tenzing@0.4.1` version.

7 commit(s) today:

  • 72ba97c [gh-pages] Built site for tenzing@0.4.1: e81218b — Anka
  • e81218b [master] improving wording — Alex O. Holcombe
  • 2365b27 [master] reword — Alex O. Holcombe
  • 92af8bb [gh-pages] Built site for tenzing@0.4.1: 99b3ee2 — Anka
  • 99b3ee2 [master] Italicize testimonials for emphasis — Alex O. Holcombe

View all commits →

item.title: oddpub: 2 commits today
item.description:
quest-bih/oddpub

The `main` branch was the focus of the recent work, where the ontogenerator's Zenodo badge was updated. The README file also underwent a "touchup", as described in the commit message. Additionally, the version number of the ontogenerator was incremented to 7.3.0. The Zenodo badge was also added in a separate commit, with another commit message simply stating "zenodo badge". Furthermore, the documentation was updated and keyword cleanup was performed, as part of the efforts to refine the ontogenerator.

2 commit(s) today:

  • e1ca58e [main] Updated Zenodo badge — ontogenerator
  • 441d354 [main] README touchup — ontogenerator
  • 998a877 [main] Increment version number to 7.3.0 — ontogenerator
  • 95643d5 [main] zenodo badge — ontogenerator
  • 7c98de1 [main] Documentation update, keyword cleanup — ontogenerator
  • febed59 [main] documentation update — ontogenerator
  • 2b600f3 [main] improved reuse and upon request, references detection — ontogenerator
  • 52e8aeb [main] no_new_code statements — ontogenerator
  • f2850fe [main] debugging open data detection db 2023-2024 — ontogenerator

View all commits →
